overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dense orange-hazed futuristic city at dusk. The character traverses sidewalks lined with digital billboards, crosses a street intersection, and continues into deep fog past a food vendor stall.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk beneath overhead transit structures with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath massive overhead bridge structures, passing concrete planters and illuminated advertisements

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera on the left side of the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying advertisements with bright yellow text on the right building facade
circular concrete planter containing a single tree in the middle of the walkway
massive concrete and metal bridge connecting buildings overhead with industrial architecture
tall building with glass windows and industrial concrete elements

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a futuristic city sidewalk beneath massive overhead bridge structures. Digital billboards illuminate the right side of the street while concrete planters dot the walkway. The orange haze creates a moody atmosphere as the character approaches an intersection in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street
character turns right onto the adjacent sidewalk after crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the marked crosswalk, waiting for a black vehicle to pass, then turning right onto the new sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection from right to left
person in red jacket crossing the street ahead of the character

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
tall traffic signal pole displaying red light
street sign reading MUREN mounted on a black pole
dark building wall with red graffiti art

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide city intersection, navigating around a passing vehicle. After crossing, the character turns right onto a new sidewalk marked with a MUREN street sign. The environment shifts from the covered walkway to an open intersection before turning onto another foggy sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy palm-lined sidewalk with food vendor and dense atmospheric haze

events.description: visibility decreases significantly as the character enters an area with denser fog and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy sidewalk past the Cirkus food stall, following a distant silhouette into the dense orange fog

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking ahead into the dense fog

entered.detail: small food vendor stall with blue neon CIRKUS signage and menu displays
row of palm trees lining the left side of the sidewalk in planters
bright orange light source glowing through the dense fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing the Cirkus food vendor stall. The orange haze becomes denser, obscuring the sky and reducing visibility. A bright glow emanates from deep within the fog ahead as the character continues walking into the atmospheric depths of the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic city that transitions from a structured urban walkway into a dense, atmospheric haze. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk beneath massive overhead bridges, where digital billboards cast a glow against the moody orange haze. As the character reaches a wide intersection, the camera follows them across the street and around a passing vehicle before turning right onto a sidewalk marked by a MUREN street sign. The scene then shifts into a more obscured environment lined with palm trees and the Cirkus food vendor stall, as the orange haze thickens to hide the sky. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the atmospheric depths of the city, moving toward a bright glow emanating from the fog ahead.
